Author: MathDad
Name: Senpan Admin Companion
Description: Serves as an alternative to many of the web-interface functions, allowing staff to operate various systems from within the game.
Punchline: Allows Senpan Tea House staff to use various app services right from the game.
Changelog: A major UI/UX overhaul of the companion window, plus in-place editing of saved Timed Text Macros. A shared design language now runs across every page — icon section headers, a button system (primary/secondary/destructive) that matches the web dashboard's colours, copy/delete icon buttons, badges, and cards — so related controls read as a group and a Delete never looks like a Create. The always-available tools (Rolls, Timed Text Macros, Settings, About) sit under a collapsible General group in the sidebar. Each Timed Text Macro is its own card with a Show/Hide message toggle, the Rolls page is split into Captured rolls / Filter / Find the winner / Rolls sections, and the bingo win-pattern list has a Collapse all / Show all toggle.
